# Region taxa: `bio_region_taxa`

The list of taxa were reduced to only those found within a particular area. For example, the original data may contain records of all taxa across Australia. If 'region taxa' were limited to, say, South Australian taxa, taxa without a record in South Australia were removed, while records outside of South Australia for taxa any records inside South Australia remain.

This step also has the effect of removing all NA values in the `taxa` column.
